concerns.detail: Insertion contains profanity and personal insults ('傻逼', '狗腿', 'sha diao') directed at individuals deleting comments, constituting pure personal attacks without criticism of concrete advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 删评论的，你成功把我们惹急了，小红书、知乎见！！！没见过他妈的这么不要脸的傻逼！

concerns.detail: Deletion removes parenthetical text alleging continuous content suppression ('狗腿报道而且一直删除内容'), suppressing substantive observations about document manipulation rather than performing cleanup of typos or off-topic content.
concerns.excerpt: (在匿名文档写别人名字，真是有点搞笑了，，，，人品太差 （⬅️什么意思，狗腿本人报道？）（狗腿报道而且一直删除内容！)
